basic_details.job_title: TMC HBCH Varanasi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Resident / Medical Officer post
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre Homi Bhabha Cancer Hospital (TMC HBCH Varanasi) Senior Resident / Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the TMC HBCH Varanasi Senior Resident / Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. Pediatric or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by NMC, M.B.B.S. degree recognized by NMC
qualification.details: For Senior Resident: M.D. / D.N.B. Pediatric or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by NMC. For Medical Officer: M.B.B.S. degree recognized by NMC.

salary_details.details: Senior Resident: Rs. 1,33,623/- per month consolidated. Medical Officer: Rs. 1,11,132/- per month consolidated.
